description: PROP-EPNS-013 specifies Clock.now() call count per path including dirty-success=1 and same-note=1. The pipeline tests cover idle=1, empty=2, dirty-fail=1, but omit explicit pipeline-level clock count verification for dirty-success (1) and same-note (1). While the individual step tests establish flush=0 and startNewSession=1 separately, no integration test confirms the combined count for dirty-success or same-note paths. PROP-EPNS-013 calls for verifying all five paths.
